id: magnitude calibration across rate (fresh 20NG, GO-P-2026-041 domain)
note: Delta_pred = tr[P_C(Sd_O - Sd_R)] tracks the measured downstream AUROC gap across bit rate at r=0.995; both decrease monotonically toward high rate as Prop 1 (finite-rate criterion) requires. Predicts effect size up to a domain-specific scale constant; cross-domain scale calibration is the open next step.
